title: Experiential Learning - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Experiential Learning - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Experiential Learning at Khoury College
Rigorous academics coupled with experiential learning opportunities set Khoury students apart
Northeastern’s Khoury College gives students the opportunity to take what they’re learning in the classroom and apply it to real-world problems right away — you don’t need to wait until graduation to make a difference and confirm your career choice.
#1
University for co-ops,
U.S. News & World Report
598
Undergraduate co-op partners
490
Graduate co-op partners
93%
Employers would choose to hire co-op student full time
Apply what you’re learning right away
Access to leading business and nonprofit partners
Access to leading business and nonprofit partners
Leading tech companies and nonprofits around the globe are eager to work with Khoury students. AWS, Google, Wayfair, Fidelity — and community-based organizations driven by social good — recognize the talent of Khoury students and the contributions they can make on day one.
Build your resume and professional network
Build your resume and professional network
Throughout your time at Khoury College, you’ll build your resume and develop career contacts with potential employees — a network you’ll tap as your career unfolds and grows.
Job opportunities when you graduate
Job opportunities when you graduate
Ninety-three percent of co-op employers report that they would hire their co-op students when they graduate if a position exists or becomes available, a testament to the quality of Khoury students and the impact of their work.
Learn more about
Undergraduate co-op
Graduate co-op
Global opportunities (for undergraduates)
Research opportunities at all levels
Northeastern provides a wide-ranging ecosystem for student research. Students collaborate with leading researchers to advance discoveries and level up skill sets that prepare them for both industry and graduate programs. Undergraduate-level research opportunities include:
A full-time paid research co-op with a faculty member provides a six-month experience that has a similar structure and application process to an industry co-op
An independent study for credit with a faculty member pursuing research
The Honors in the Discipline program, which spreads a project over several semesters and recognizes research achievements within coursework.
Global opportunities at Khoury College’s network campuses
Master’s students have the opportunity to pursue their studies at eight of Khoury College’s global network campuses. Undergraduate students have a variety of ways to access this network:
Start freshman year at one of four Khoury College global campuses
Co-op opportunities at a different network campus
Summer credit programs at campuses around the globe
